title: Point blank Easy Workbench
description: A very simple mod that makes Vic's Pointblank Workbenches craftable in a balanced way.
body:
This mod makes it so you can make the workbench from the Pointblank mod rather than having to find it in a village.

 

 

Just take a log, any log, from any mod, and two polished andesite slabs , then put 1 gun internal and a good ol american m4 and boom, you've got a Star-Spangled Banner approved workbench!

 

Extra stuff im obligated to say: 

Yes add it to yourmodpack its cool with me

You need the original Vic's pointblank for it to run. Obv.
